title: staff — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. Staff lifecycle events (hire / offboard / branch-change / manager-promotion) fan out to notifications + activity + audit. CompensationChanged is a PRIVATE-TIER event — it dispatches to a dedicated `compensation-audit` queue and the payload is NEVER logged in the ActivityLog (only in the separate staff_compensation_history audit table). CoachCertificationExpired is a scheduled-job event that fires on the day a certification lapses — consumers include the notification module (30/14/7-day pre-expiry reminders + the day-of expiry notice).

events.name: StaffHired
events.trigger: StaffObserver.updating detected employment_status transition `pre_hire → active`. Also fires when a Staff is created directly at `active` status (the same-tenant admin-driven hire path). Fires exactly once per Staff row.

payload.employment_type: string (full_time / part_time / contract / volunteer / intern / seasonal)

events.name: StaffUpdated
events.trigger: Any Staff scalar field mutated except employment_status (dedicated transition events), position (StaffPositionChanged), department (StaffDepartmentChanged), branch_id (StaffBranchChanged), is_branch_manager (StaffPromotedToBranchManager / StaffDemotedFromBranchManager), and compensation_* (CompensationChanged). Umbrella event for name-of-record changes, employee_number edits, weekly_hours tweaks, reports_to reassignments, probation_ends_at edits.

events.name: StaffPositionChanged
events.trigger: Staff.position mutated. A dedicated event because position changes drive downstream notifications (the branch manager wants to know when their receptionist is promoted to assistant coach).

events.name: StaffDepartmentChanged
events.trigger: Staff.department mutated. Feeds the org-chart cache invalidator + activity feed.

events.name: StaffBranchChanged
events.trigger: Staff.branch_id mutated. RARE — most staff have one home branch for their entire tenure. When it changes, notifies old + new branch managers. Wave 2b marks Staff.branch_id immutable post-create; this event fires only via the Wave 3+ branch-transfer flow.

events.name: StaffPromotedToBranchManager
events.trigger: Staff.is_branch_manager transitioned false → true. Observer refuses when another active manager exists for the same branch AND does NOT auto-demote — the observer requires the caller to explicitly demote the previous manager first (avoids silent org-chart rewrites).

events.name: StaffDemotedFromBranchManager
events.trigger: Staff.is_branch_manager transitioned true → false. Distinct from StaffOffboarded — a demotion keeps the Staff row active.

events.name: StaffPutOnLeave
events.trigger: Staff.employment_status transitioned active → on_leave. Non-terminal. Consumers pause the coach's future session assignments + shift assignments.
consumers: staff::CascadeCoachStatusOnStaffOffboarding (pauses linked Coach — the same listener handles leave + offboard since the coach-side effect is identical)

events.name: StaffReturnedFromLeave
events.trigger: Staff.employment_status transitioned on_leave → active. Cascades: resume linked Coach if it was paused as a side-effect of the leave.

events.name: StaffSuspended
events.trigger: Staff.employment_status transitioned active/on_leave → suspended. AUDIT-CRITICAL — suspensions are disciplinary and every fire is retained 7 years.
consumers: notifications::DispatchStaffSuspendedNotification (to branch manager — cannot-opt-out; the suspended staff themselves are notified via HR channel)

events.name: StaffReinstated
events.trigger: Staff.employment_status transitioned suspended → active. Distinct from StaffReturnedFromLeave.

events.name: StaffOffboardingStarted
events.trigger: Staff.employment_status transitioned active/on_leave/suspended → offboarding. Intermediate state — the actual offboard (with cascade to TeamMember + Coach + ShiftAssignment) happens on the offboarding → offboarded transition. This event is the SIGNAL that HR should start the cascade cleanup + reminder dispatch.

events.name: StaffOffboarded
events.trigger: Staff.employment_status transitioned offboarding → offboarded. Terminal. The Staff row is soft-deleted; ended_at is set; the ReleaseSlot side-effect fires on the same transaction (releases 1 unit of staff_slot entitlement).
consumers: notifications::DispatchStaffOffboardedNotification (to team members if the staff was a coach — cannot-opt-out)
user::UnblockUserArchiveWhenLastStaffOffboarded (removes the block that prevents User archive while active Staff exists)

payload.termination_reason: string (resigned / terminated / retired / contract_ended / seasonal_end / other)

events.name: StaffReactivated
events.trigger: Staff.employment_status transitioned offboarded → active (rehire). RARE — most rehires happen as new Staff rows; the reactivation path preserves the original employment history for tax / seniority calculations. Observer consumes 1 unit of staff_slot entitlement + resets ended_at to null.

events.name: CompensationChanged
events.trigger: Any of Staff.compensation_type / compensation_amount_cents / compensation_currency / pay_frequency mutated. PRIVATE-TIER event — the payload is NEVER routed through the activity feed and the audit row lands in the dedicated `staff_compensation_history` table with 7-year retention. Consumers include the Finance module (Wave 4 payroll re-computation) and the HR audit trail.
consumers: audit::WriteToCompensationHistoryLog (retention: 7 years; NOT the normal audits table)
notifications::DispatchCompensationChangedNotification (to affected staff ONLY, via HR channel — never in-app default)

events.name: CoachCreated
events.trigger: CoachRepository committed a new coaches row. Fires when a Staff first assumes a coaching role — either at Staff hire (admin sets up the coach profile alongside the Staff row) OR later (a receptionist promoted to assistant coach gets a Coach row attached).

events.name: CoachSportChanged
events.trigger: Coach.sport_key mutated. Rare — a coach's primary sport is typically career-defining. When it happens, notifies the branch manager + invalidates the sport-directory cache.

events.name: CoachCertificationAdded
events.trigger: A new entry was appended to Coach.certifications. Fires per certification added — batch updates emit N events. When coach_certifications_verified entitlement is on (Enterprise), the certification enters pending-verification state and HR gets a review notification.

events.name: CoachCertificationExpired
events.trigger: ExpireCoachCertificationsJob detected a certification past its expires_at. The certification stays in the array but is tagged with `expired_at`. Fires per expired certification.
consumers: notifications::DispatchCoachCertificationExpiringNotification (final — the 30/14/7-day pre-expiry reminders fired earlier from ExpiringSoon jobs)

events.name: CoachCertificationRemoved
events.trigger: A certification entry was removed from Coach.certifications. Fires per certification removed.

events.name: CoachRatingUpdated
events.trigger: AggregateCoachRatingsJob recomputed Coach.rating + rating_count from the last batch of session-rating rows (Wave 3+ scheduling module). AGGREGATED event — fires once per job invocation per Coach, not per individual rating write.
consumers: notifications::DispatchCoachRatingUpdatedNotification (opt-in — only when the delta is > 0.5 stars)

events.name: CoachStatusChanged
events.trigger: Coach.status transitioned. Values: active / paused / archived. Distinct from Staff.employment_status — a Staff may be active while their Coach is paused (temporary coaching hiatus during a busy admin period).
consumers: notifications::DispatchCoachOnLeaveNotification (when to_status='paused' or 'archived' — to active team members, cannot-opt-out)

events.name: CoachAvailabilityChanged
events.trigger: Coach.availability_pattern mutated. Feeds the scheduling module's shift-suggester cache invalidation.
